executionOrder: Phase K (Voice) → Phase I (UI/Landing) → Phase J (Security) → Final Audit

tasks.title: Voice Quota Enforcement (A.1–A.3)

B.4-Part2: Inbox LLM tier dropdown + dynamic Pricing.vue
Voice Studio JWT SSO (permanent)
tasks.notes: JWT-in-URL, immune to 3p cookies

tasks.notes: DeepSeek + chat UI + FAB + edit interceptor

tasks.title: White-Label Dograh (8 Dockerfile patches)
Voice Usage Card Sidebar Fix
tasks.notes: Jun 6 2026 — route name fix

tasks.title: Legal pages (Terms/Privacy/Refund/Data-Deletion)
Production hardening 17/17 (P0–P2)
tasks.notes: Sentry, backups, rate limit, etc.

tasks.title: D.1 Meta Business Manager + App setup
tasks.notes: After FB OTP works. App ID + Secret. Add WA/FB Login/Insta products

tasks.title: D.2 Udyam (MSME) certificate
tasks.notes: udyamregistration.gov.in — free, instant. Parallel with D.1

tasks.title: D.3 WhatsApp channel via CloudWhatsapp.vue
tasks.notes: Connect Meta App + WA Business number → test inbox flow

tasks.title: D.4 Facebook Messenger via Facebook.vue
tasks.notes: Page admin access + DM test

tasks.title: D.5 Instagram via Instagram.vue
tasks.notes: IG Business linked to FB Page

tasks.title: D.6 Embedded Signup approval submission
tasks.notes: Upgrade Meta Employee system user to Admin, regenerate token, paste into TAMALE WhatsApp inbox settings. June 17

tasks.title: F.1 Long-term memory layer (pgvector)
tasks.notes: COMPLETE: CustomerMemory model, EmbeddingService, MemoryService, MemoryExtractionJob, AiAutoReplyJob memory recall. Similarity threshold 0.72.

tasks.title: F.2 Multi-turn reasoning + tool calling
tasks.notes: COMPLETE: AiTools::ToolExecutor, ShopifyIntegration, ShiprocketIntegration, tool loop (max 3 iter), confidence tags [CONF:HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW], pending confirmation gate, COT_ADDENDUM. ai_tools_config jsonb column on accounts.

tasks.title: F.3 Emotion-adaptive Senior Agent persona
tasks.notes: Dynamic tone matrix (empathetic/technical/celebratory), customer_profile service tracks sentiment trends

tasks.title: F.4 Self-improving KB (gap detection + auto-merge)
tasks.notes: Diff AI attempt vs human resolution → gap note → auto KB draft. pgvector semantic dedup

tasks.title: F.5 Autonomous Actions (refund/cancel/extend trial)
tasks.notes: Idempotent pre-approved actions, customer confirmation for sensitive ops, audit log

tasks.title: F.6 Predictive support (proactive widget trigger)
tasks.notes: URL pattern + dwell-time rule engine. Auto-intervene on cancellation/billing page

tasks.title: F.7 Multi-agent collaboration (Triage/Tech/Billing)
tasks.notes: Sub-agent prompts per category, internal handoff, specialized KB each

tasks.title: F.8 Cross-Channel Unified Customer Profile
tasks.notes: Omnichannel memory: customer_id (email/phone) as key, conversation summaries across WhatsApp/Messenger/voice/web stored in pgvector. Inject unified context on any channel contact. Reuses F.1 MemoryService infrastructure.

tasks.title: F.9 Shadow Learning — AI learns from human agents
tasks.notes: PARTIALLY BUILT. Shadow Session recorder: captures human agent actions after AI handoff, diffs AI attempt vs human resolution, updates system prompt playbook. All data stays on-server. Needs audit + refinement.

tasks.title: G.1 ElevenLabs TTS integration
tasks.notes: Platform-paid by default. Voice library + per-agent voice picker UI

tasks.title: G.2 Multi-LLM voice backend (Gemini/OpenAI/Claude/DeepSeek)
tasks.notes: Provider abstraction in Dograh, hosted by TAMALE keys

tasks.title: G.3 Model picker UI per agent
tasks.notes: Dropdown in Agent Builder: LLM + Voice + tier-based pricing reflected in credit multiplier

tasks.title: G.4 BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) UI
tasks.notes: Per-user encrypted key storage (rails encrypts), fallback to platform key if user key fails

tasks.title: G.5 Voice realism controls (speed/emotion/accent/pause)
tasks.notes: Per-agent prompt-level SSML or provider-native controls

tasks.title: G.6 Human-likeness tuning (filler words, breathing, latency)
tasks.notes: Compare ElevenLabs Turbo vs Flash vs Multilingual. Sub-500ms TTFB target

tasks.title: H.1 Agency role + agency_accounts join table
tasks.notes: Many-to-many: 1 agency → N child accounts. Migration + policies

tasks.title: H.2 Agency dashboard + multi-account switcher UI
tasks.notes: /agency/dashboard — grid of child accounts with status/credits/calls today

tasks.title: H.3 Live credit usage per child account (websocket)
tasks.notes: ActionCable broadcast on credit deduction → live counter updates

tasks.title: H.4 One-click signed impersonation (no re-login)
tasks.notes: Short-lived JWT signed by agency role → lands on child dashboard. Audit logged

tasks.title: H.5 Unified insights (calls/conv/credits across accounts)
tasks.notes: Charts: total spend, top issues, KB hit-rate. Export CSV

tasks.title: H.6 Agency billing aggregation + reseller margin
tasks.notes: Roll up child accounts → agency invoice. Markup % configurable

tasks.title: H.7 Agency-branded sub-login portal (white-label)
tasks.notes: agency.tamaleapp.com/<slug> with agency logo for end-clients

tasks.title: K.0.1 GCP snapshot + DB dump (tamale-pre-phase-k)
tasks.notes: Pre-work safety net before any LiveKit changes

tasks.title: K.0.2 Audit Dograh tamale-production branch — document all integration points with Chatwoot
tasks.notes: Map every place Dograh talks to Chatwoot (webhooks, JWT SSO, quota checks, conversation creation)

tasks.title: K.0.3 List all Dograh features to replicate (STT, TTS, call triggering, transcript saving, escalation)
tasks.notes: Feature parity checklist before decommission

tasks.title: K.0.4 Map Dograh env vars to LiveKit equivalent env vars
tasks.notes: Document old → new env var mapping for .env migration

tasks.title: K.0.5 Verify Cartesia account + API key (ElevenLabs replacement TTS)
tasks.notes: Cartesia is the TTS provider for LiveKit stack

tasks.title: K.0.6 Verify Deepgram account + API key (STT)
tasks.notes: Deepgram is the STT provider for LiveKit stack

tasks.title: K.1.1 Add tamale-livekit service to docker-compose.yml
tasks.notes: K.1 — LiveKit Server Deployment (2 days)

tasks.title: K.1.2 Create livekit-config.yaml (ports, API keys, TURN config)
K.1.3 Generate LiveKit API key + secret pair
K.1.4 Open GCP firewall ports (7880 TCP, 7881 TCP, 50000-50100 UDP)
K.1.5 Deploy and verify LiveKit server running
K.1.6 Test with LiveKit CLI (lk room list, lk room create)
K.1.7 Update nginx config — proxy /livekit to LiveKit server
K.2.1 Create tamale-voice-agent/ directory structure
tasks.notes: K.2 — Basic Voice Agent (3 days)

tasks.title: K.2.2 Install livekit-agents with Deepgram + Cartesia + DeepSeek plugins
K.2.3 Write basic agent entrypoint — hardcoded persona, STT to LLM to TTS pipeline
K.2.4 Create Dockerfile for voice agent container
K.2.5 Add tamale-voice-agent service to docker-compose.yml
K.2.6 Test via LiveKit Playground — speak and get AI response
K.2.7 Tune latency — measure end-of-turn to first-audio-token
K.2.8 Test Cartesia voice quality vs ElevenLabs
K.3.1 Design room naming convention: {account_id}-{conversation_id}-{timestamp}
tasks.notes: K.3 — Multi-Tenant Agent Dispatch (4 days)

tasks.title: K.3.2 Create VoiceConfig model in Rails (per-account voice settings)
K.3.3 Rails API endpoint POST /api/v1/voice/rooms — creates LiveKit room with tenant metadata
K.3.4 Agent reads room.metadata on join — loads tenant-specific config
K.3.5 Per-tenant voice selection (Cartesia voice ID in VoiceConfig)
K.3.6 Per-tenant system prompt / persona loading from AgentBot config
K.3.7 Per-tenant knowledge base wiring (reuse Phase F.1 CustomerMemory + pgvector)
K.3.8 Per-tenant tool access (reuse Phase F.2 Shopify/Shiprocket tool calling)
K.3.9 Test with 2 different tenant configs — verify complete isolation
K.4.1 On call start — create Chatwoot conversation (channel: voice, status: open)
tasks.notes: K.4 — Chatwoot Integration (4 days)

tasks.title: K.4.2 Stream real-time transcript as conversation messages
K.4.3 AI responses logged as bot messages in conversation
K.4.4 AiActionLog entries for voice interactions (reuse Phase F.5)
K.4.5 Escalation: AI transfers to human agent — agent sees full transcript
K.4.6 On call end — save duration, recording URL, final transcript
K.4.7 Voice conversations visible in unified inbox alongside text/WhatsApp/email
K.4.8 Test full flow: call → AI handles → escalate → human picks up with context
K.5.1 Choose SIP provider (Telnyx recommended)
tasks.notes: K.5 — SIP Telephony (4 days)

tasks.title: K.5.2 Configure LiveKit SIP trunk in livekit-config.yaml
K.5.3 Buy test phone number via SIP provider
K.5.4 Map phone number to tenant account in Rails
K.5.5 Inbound flow: customer dials → SIP → LiveKit → Room → Agent with tenant config
K.5.6 Test real phone call end-to-end
K.5.7 Phone number management UI in tenant dashboard
K.5.8 Per-tenant phone number provisioning API
K.6.1 Build widget JS bundle using LiveKit JS SDK (livekit-client)
tasks.notes: K.6 — Click-to-Call Widget (3 days)

tasks.title: K.6.2 Widget UI: floating call button, call screen with timer, mute, end call
K.6.3 Brand with TAMALE colors, customizable per tenant
K.6.4 Widget auth: tenant token validates, creates room, connects
K.6.5 Embed code generator in tenant dashboard
K.6.6 Host widget JS at tamaleapp.com/voice-widget.js
K.6.7 Test on external website — embed and make a call
K.7.1 Verify all Dograh features replicated in LiveKit
tasks.notes: K.7 — Dograh Decommission (2 days)

tasks.title: K.7.2 Redirect remaining Dograh API calls to LiveKit endpoints
K.7.3 Stop tamale-dograh container (keep 1 week as fallback)
K.7.4 After 1 week stable — remove from docker-compose.yml
K.7.5 Disable GHCR auto-build workflow for Dograh
K.7.6 Archive aarixu/dograh repo
K.7.7 Remove Dograh env vars from production .env
K.7.8 Update CLAUDE.md project context
K.8.1 Load test — simulate 50, 100, 200 concurrent calls
tasks.notes: K.8 — Production Hardening (3 days)

tasks.title: K.8.2 Monitor CPU, RAM, network bandwidth per concurrent call
K.8.3 Calculate max concurrent calls per VM — document scaling threshold
K.8.4 Configure LiveKit auto-reconnect and graceful degradation
K.8.5 Add voice metrics to monitoring (call duration, latency, error rate)
K.8.6 Set container restart policies for tamale-livekit and tamale-voice-agent
K.8.7 Document scaling playbook: when and how to add second LiveKit node
K.8.8 Final GCP snapshot: tamale-post-phase-k
I.1 Full VM snapshot before any UI work
tasks.notes: GCP disk snapshot + DB dump + image export. Tag "pre-ui-overhaul-snapshot"

tasks.title: I.2 Spin up staging VM clone from snapshot
tasks.notes: Optional — do before I.8 if you want safety net

tasks.title: I.3 Git state cleanup on VM before fork
tasks.notes: VM /home/tamale is detached HEAD with many uncommitted changes (F.1, F.2, all TAMALE patches). Fix: commit all changes to a tamale-production branch, push to GitHub, then proceed to fork. Antigravity local↔VM sync must be verified first.

tasks.notes: Done today

tasks.notes: Done today

tasks.notes: Sidebar/topbar/typography — the big UI work

tasks.title: I.9 Blue-green deploy strategy
tasks.notes: Final infra polish

tasks.title: J.1 JTI replay protection for Voice Studio JWT
tasks.notes: Redis-backed one-time-use enforcement. Defense-in-depth beyond 30s expiry

tasks.title: J.2 2FA (TOTP) for admin + agency accounts
tasks.notes: devise-two-factor gem. Mandatory for owner role

tasks.title: J.3 Audit log for sensitive actions
tasks.notes: Impersonation, refunds, deletions, plan changes, API key views. Immutable append-only

tasks.title: J.4 OWASP Top 10 pen-test (self + external)
tasks.notes: SQLi, XSS, CSRF, IDOR, auth bypass. OWASP ZAP locally

tasks.title: J.5 GDPR / DPDPA data export + deletion API
tasks.notes: User self-serve export (JSON) + delete workflow. Required for India DPDPA

tasks.title: J.6 Granular rate limit tuning (per endpoint, per plan)
tasks.notes: Free vs Pro different limits. Burst allowance. Rack::Attack rules

tasks.title: J.7 Session anomaly detection (new device/IP alerts)
tasks.notes: Email user on suspicious login. Optional auto-block

tasks.title: J.8 Encrypted backups → offsite (S3/GCS)
tasks.notes: High priority — currently single point of failure

tasks.title: J.9 Postgres point-in-time recovery (WAL archiving)
tasks.notes: Restore to any second within 7 days. Critical "oh shit" lifeline

tasks.title: J.10 Sentry release tracking + source maps
tasks.notes: Tag releases by git SHA → readable stack traces

tasks.title: J.11 Public status page (status.tamaleapp.com)
tasks.notes: Trust signal for agencies

tasks.title: J.12 SLA monitoring + uptime alerts
tasks.notes: SMS + email alert if downtime > 2 min

tasks.title: J.13 Disaster recovery runbook (documented)
tasks.notes: (Mostly done now via today's ops doc)

tasks.title: J.14 Container vulnerability scanning (Trivy)
tasks.notes: Weekly scan all 11 containers. Auto-PR for base image updates

tasks.title: J.15 Secrets rotation policy + automation
tasks.notes: Quarterly rotation of OSS_JWT_SECRET, webhook secrets, API keys

tasks.title: J.16 Cloudflare WAF + DDoS protection
tasks.notes: Free tier protects against volumetric attacks + bot mitigation

tasks.title: J.17 Dependency security audit in CI
tasks.notes: bundler-audit + npm audit blocks PRs with known CVEs

tasks.title: J.18 Customer-facing API tokens scope-limited
tasks.notes: Read-only vs full-access tokens. Revoke UI. Last-used timestamp
